title: Seamless Stripped Wood
description: Seamless Stripped Wood makes stripped wood blocks look more consistent when put together.
body:
**Seamless Stripped Wood** makes stripped wood blocks look more consistent when put together. Doesn't require Optifine. That's all. There's not much to it.
#
**This pack does not require OptiFine or any of its alternatives to work.**
#
Also available on Planet Minecraft: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/seamless-stripped-wood/
